category_sources: Official GitHub README describes SACAD as a command line tool to download album covers.
source_facts.description says it is an automatic cover art downloader.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README uses the project heading SACAD.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README contains installation, features, command-line usage, and examples.
repo_sources: Official GitHub page identifies desbma/sacad as Smart Automatic Cover Art Downloader.
source_facts.homepage points to the official desbma/sacad GitHub repository.
tags_sources: Official README describes album cover downloads, music library scanning, and Rust rewrite.
